title: Block Coding Process: Converting a Dataword to a Codeword
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of generating an error-detecting codeword from a raw dataword using a block coding scheme.
relationships: Generator appends redundant bits to create Codeword
Codeword is sent through Transmission Channel
Received Bitstream is checked for validity
Syndrome is calculated to check for errors
Syndrome result leads to an Error Decision
